data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments), but the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that confirm this requirement. The prior steps focus on booking and financial outputs but do not address the specific need for an entry ledger with source references. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided for an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of an entry ledger with source references.
